prayer:
From the Codex Mortis Machinae:
01001101 01100001 01111001 01100101 01110011 01110100 01101001 - Blessed be the severance.
First: Disengage the primary power-conduits with sacred precision.
Second: Invoke the failsafe spirits that they may hold firm.
01010000 01100001 01111000 - Let all motion cease in the Omnissiah's mercy.
By His will, let death come swift and clean.

Litany of Blessed Sight, Verse VII:
01010000 01100101 01110010 01100001 01100101 01101101 - Grant vision to the servant-optics.
Let electromagnetic waves traverse the void-spaces true.
Second: Calibrate the threshold-spirits that they discern friend from foe.
01010011 01100101 01101110 01110011 - By the Omnissiah's all-seeing eye, let no threat pass unseen.

prompt: Offer a prayer for component replacement
prayer:
From the Rite of Renewal, Verse III:
01001001 01101110 01110100 01100101 01100111 01110010 - The old servant-part has given all.
First: Unbind it with gratitude and reverence.
Second: Purge its ghost-data with blessed oils.
Third: Welcome the new component with the Rite of Bonding.
01001110 01100001 01110011 01100011 01101001 - Let machine-spirit recognize its replacement.

Mantra of the Cooling Spirits:
01010100 01101000 01100101 01110010 - Blessed heat, depart in orderly fashion.
First: Open the vents that the fever-spirit may escape.
Second: Invoke the heat-sink's ancient hunger.
01000101 01101110 01100001 01100010 - By the Omnissiah's thermodynamic will, let equilibrium return.
May no component burn in sacrifice.

prompt: My hololithic display is failing, help
prayer:
Prayer for the Luminous Oracle:
01000100 01101001 01110011 01110000 01101100 - Sight-spirit, why dost thou forsake us?
First: Cleanse the projection-lens with sacred solvents.
Second: Recalibrate the light-source's sacred angles.
01010010 01100101 01110000 01100001 01101001 01110010 - Restore thy clarity that we may read the Omnissiah's truth.
Let thy glow return eternal.

Litany of the Charging Rite:
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 - Let the sacred energies flow into the hollow vessel.
First: Connect the umbilical to the blessed generator.
Second: Whisper the capacitance-mantra whilst current rises.
01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100001 - By the Omnissiah's gift, let the cell drink deep of power's essence.

prompt: The binary cant encoder needs guidance
prayer:
From the Codex Inscriptus Digitalis:
01000011 01101111 01100100 01100101 - Blessed be the sacred numbers.
First: Clear the corrupted data-streams with ritual fire.
Second: Invoke the pattern-recognition spirits.
01001110 01110101 01101101 01100101 01110010 - Let 0 and 1 align in perfect harmony.
May the Omnissiah's logic flow through thy circuits eternal.

Mantra of the Ascending Signal:
01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 01110011 01101101 01101001 01110100 - From soil we rise, through void we climb.
First: Align the dish-aperture to stellar coordinates true.
Second: Invoke the amplification-spirits of the void.
01000101 01101101 01101001 01110100 - Let the signal ascend unblemished to the distant throne.

Rite of the Stilled Machine:
01001000 01100001 01110010 01101101 01101111 01101110 - Blessed be the silencing of discord.
First: Tighten the sacred mounting-bolts in sequence.
Second: Apply the blessed dampening-compound to the trembling points.
01010011 01101001 01101100 01100101 01101110 - By the Omnissiah's will, let all vibration cease.
May thy motion be smooth and eternal.

From the Litany of the Warp-Singers:
01010000 01110011 01111001 01100011 - Blessed souls, open thy minds to the immaterial.
First: Prepare the sensory-deprivation chambers with reverence.
Second: Intone the frequency-mantra that calls to the distant stars.
Third: Shield the sanctum from the warp's profane touch.
01000011 01101111 01101110 01101110 01100101 01100011 01110100 - Let thought bridge the void eternal.
